text: OmniDesk crashes EVERY time I try to export a PDF report. Like literally every single time. I've lost hours of work because of this garbage.
L'interface est complètement en anglais même si j'ai choisi français. Les boutons sont traduits mais les menus déroulants restent en anglais. C'est n'importe quoi.
ngl omnidesk pdf export is broken af. tried 3 times today, crashed every time. support said 'we're aware' like ok cool thx
J'ai essayé d'exporter mon rapport en PDF et ça a planté. Deux fois. Mon boss était pas content mettons.
The French localization is a joke. Half the strings aren't translated and the date format is still MM/DD/YYYY instead of DD/MM/YYYY. My Quebec team is furious.
Pricing is competitive and features are solid overall.
Exporter en PDF? Oubliez ça. Ça plante à chaque fois. On dirait que personne teste cette fonctionnalité là.
why does omnidesk not have proper french support in 2026?? my clients in montreal literally cant use half the features bc theyre all in english
PDF export = instant crash. Been like this for 3 months. Zero fix. Thinking about switching to a competitor honestly.
Le support en français est vraiment mauvais. Quand j'écris en français, ils me répondent en anglais. Pis l'application elle-même est à moitié traduite.
Tried the new analytics module. Pretty good actually! But then I tried to export and... you guessed it... crash.
omnidesk ui is clean ngl but the pdf thing is killing me. literally cannot send reports to clients anymore
La traduction française est horrible. Y'a des boutons qui disent 'Submit' au lieu de 'Soumettre'. On est en 2026 là, c'est pas acceptable.
Great customer support team, very responsive. But please fix the PDF export bug, it's been months!
The onboarding was smooth. Integration with Slack is nice. But French-speaking users on my team can't navigate properly — translations are incomplete.
Chaque fois que j'essaie de faire un PDF, l'application gèle pis je dois tout recommencer. C'est frustrant en tabarnak.
The dashboard loads pretty fast on most days. Performance is acceptable.
We evaluated OmniDesk for our Montreal office but had to pass because the French localization was embarrassingly bad. Missing translations everywhere.
J'aime le produit en général mais le PDF crash constamment. Mon équipe utilise des captures d'écran à la place. C'est ridicule.
omnidesk needs to hire actual french translators lol. the google translate vibes are real. my coworkers in quebec city are not impressed
Solid helpdesk platform with good ticket routing. Just wish the PDF reports actually worked. Crashed 4 times this week alone.
Les rapports PDF plantent tout le temps. J'ai perdu un rapport de 20 pages. Aucune sauvegarde automatique non plus.
Love the API. Docs are clear. But the actual product has some rough edges — especially PDF export and i18n.
switched from omnidesk to freshdesk just bc of the pdf export crashes. couldnt deal anymore
The mobile app is surprisingly good. Desktop web app though? PDF export is completely broken.
L'application plante quand on essaie d'exporter quoi que ce soit en PDF. C'est le problème numéro un pour notre équipe.
OmniDesk's AI features are cool but the basic stuff doesn't work. Can't export PDFs without a crash. Priorities, people.
qqun d'autre a le bug du PDF qui crash? jsuis tanné de perdre mes rapports à cause de ça omg
We're a bilingual company (EN/FR) and OmniDesk fails us on the French side. Incomplete translations, wrong date formats, and some screens are 100% English.
If you need PDF exports, run away from OmniDesk. It has crashed on me at least 10 times in the last month. No exaggeration.
Le produit est beau mais la localisation en français est bâclée. On voit que c'est fait avec Google Translate.
omnidesk pricing is fair tbh. just fix the damn pdf export and itd be perfect
Tried to demo OmniDesk to our French-Canadian clients. Half the UI was in English. Super embarrassing. Lost the deal.
PDF = crash. À chaque. Maudit. Fois. Je vais changer de plateforme bientôt si ça continue.
The workflow automation is genuinely impressive. But I need to export reports and PDFs just... don't work.
day 47 of asking omnidesk to fix pdf export. still broken. still crashing. still losing data.
La version française est une blague. Les erreurs de traduction sont partout. 'Delete' est traduit par 'Effacer' au lieu de 'Supprimer' dans certains endroits.
OmniDesk has potential but the PDF crash bug is a dealbreaker. We're evaluating alternatives right now.
Nice concept but needs polish. The French version feels like an afterthought. Quebec market is huge, guys.
lol omnidesk en français c'est tellement mal traduit. y'a des phrases qui font même pas de sens. on dirait du google translate direct
Our IT team flagged OmniDesk's PDF export as a critical bug. Every time someone tries to generate a report, the whole browser tab crashes.
On a choisi OmniDesk pour le prix mais la qualité de la traduction française nous fait regretter. C'est vraiment pas professionnel.
Love the integrations, hate the PDF export. 5 crashes in one day trying to send a quarterly report. Unacceptable for enterprise software.
omnidesk french localization is sooo bad. date formats wrong, currency symbols wrong, some modals still fully in english
The ticket management is top-notch. But when my Montreal team complains daily about French translation issues, something is fundamentally wrong.
Impossible d'exporter en PDF sans que ça plante. On a dû utiliser des screenshots pour nos présentations. Pas très pro.
Decent for small teams. Wouldn't recommend for bilingual orgs though — the French support is non-existent basically.
le pdf crash encore aujourd'hui. j'en peux pu. qqun connait une alternative?
OmniDesk is like a sports car with a flat tire. Great features on paper, but PDF export crashes make it unusable for my reporting needs.
Entre le PDF qui plante et la traduction française qui est à moitié faite, on dirait qu'OmniDesk s'en fout du marché québécois.
When I export large reports to PDF it consistently fails. The app just hangs and forces me to restart my browser.
tried to export my dataset as pdf today... silence. then white screen. then nothin. this is ridiculous
Everything is perfect except the PDF export feature literally does not work. I've tested it 15+ times. Always crashes.
The reporting dashboard is beautiful until you try to export to PDF. Then disaster strikes.
Been using this for 6 months and the ONLY issue is the catastrophic PDF export bug. Seriously needs fixing.
Amazing UI, amazing features, terrible PDF export reliability. It's preventing us from using this as our main reporting tool.
pdf export broken. pdf export broken. pdf export broken. did i mention pdf export is broken
The PDF feature is the biggest weakness of this platform. It crashes every single time with any substantial data.
J'essaye d'utiliser le français mais c'est impossible. Trop de boutons restent en anglais. Le menu c'est 50% EN 50% FR.
Customer service is responsive. Product features are solid. PDF export is completely broken though.

Pricing is reasonable but they need to fix their PDF export immediately. It's a showstopper.
PDF export crashes consistently. I've lost count of how many times I've reported this bug.
The platform is great for data management but exporting to PDF is completely non-functional.
serious question: has ANYONE on the omnidesk team ever tried exporting a report as pdf? bc it ALWAYS breaks

The PDF export bug is preventing enterprise adoption. This needs to be their top priority.
Beautiful platform, broken PDF feature. That's the tldr for OmniDesk.
Pourquoi la traduction en français c'est si mauvaise? Même Deepl c'est mieux que ça.
The PDF export reliability is the single biggest blocker to us renewing our contract.
I love almost everything about OmniDesk except the PDF export which is completely unusable.
cant export anything to pdf without it breaking. why is this still an issue. fix it please

Our deal-breaker: PDF export is unreliable. We need stable reporting and OmniDesk can't deliver.
5 out of 5 features work great. 1 feature (PDF export) doesn't work at all. That's a problem.

Perfect tool for 90% of my needs but that 10% (PDF export) is completely broken.

pro tip: dont try to export anything to pdf with omnidesk you will be disappointed

The bugs in PDF export make this unsuitable for production use in our enterprise.

omnidesk team needs to spend a week fixing pdf export then they can work on new features
The PDF export failure rate is unacceptable for any business software. Why is this not priority 1?
OmniDesk's fatal flaw is the broken PDF export. It's the main feature we need and it doesn't work.
Good product held back by terrible PDF export. Fix that and you'd dominate the market.
In summary: amazing platform except PDF exports crash 100% of the time for us. Deal breaker.
PDF export still broken after all this time. We've moved to a competitor.
